assumptions: The declared intragroup dividend has created a recognised intragroup monetary receivable and corresponding payable.
The receivable is between group entities with different functional currencies, so the related foreign exchange gains or losses are not fully eliminated on consolidation.

approaches.label: Fair value hedge
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: A recognised intragroup monetary receivable can be designated for hedge accounting in consolidated financial statements by hedging its foreign currency risk component, provided the IFRS 9 qualification, documentation and effectiveness conditions are met.
